detailed_findings.description: Direct string concatenation in SQL query allows SQL injection attacks
detailed_findings.code_snippet: query := "SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '" + userInput + "'"
detailed_findings.data_flow_analysis: User input 'userInput' flows directly into SQL query without parameterization

detailed_findings.description: API key hardcoded in source code
detailed_findings.data_flow_analysis: Sensitive credential exposed in compiled binary
detailed_findings.fix_suggestion: Load API key from environment variables using os.Getenv

detailed_findings.description: User input used directly in file path without validation
detailed_findings.data_flow_analysis: HTTP request parameter flows directly into filepath without sanitization
detailed_findings.fix_suggestion: Use filepath.Clean and validate path is within allowed directory
